questionHtml: Sketch, on the pV diagram, the complete cycle of changes for the gas, labelling the changes clearly. The expansion shown in (a) and (b) is drawn for you.
markschemeHtml:
concave curve from RHS of present line to point above LHS of present line

vertical line from previous curve to the beginning

 

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: Sketch, on the pV diagram, the complete cycle of changes for the gas, labelling the changes clearly. The expansion shown in (a) and (b) is drawn for you.
